title: The Most Important Gates in Quantum Computing Explained
summary: IBM Technology explains fundamental quantum computing gates including Hadamard and CNOT gates, covering qubits, superposition, and entanglement. The video demonstrates how these gates shape quantum circuits and their importance in quantum computation.
